# Compiler / Runtime PRs

Optimization recipe: Treat compiler/runtime integration as part of the kernel: launch wrapper, cache/JIT behavior, generated code, and build flags need tests.

NCU first look: Generated kernel shape, launch overhead, occupancy, register pressure, and compile-time-selected schedule.

## Inspection Questions

- Which generated source or wrapper changed the runtime behavior?
- How should standalone candidates reproduce the same launch and cache contract?

## PRs

| Repo | PR | Merged | What to inspect | Ledger key |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
